title: RadiologyFormatterOutput
description: Schema the model must return. Use this as the responseSchema / structured-output constraint when calling Gemini so the response is always valid JSON your code can parse.

formatted_report.description: Full display-ready report text with section headers.

sections.description: Section name -> content, for field-wise rendering/storage.

corrections.description: Every change the model made, for radiologist review. Empty array if none.

flags.description: Ambiguous or unsafe-to-fix items needing radiologist attention. Empty array if none.

unchanged_protected.description: Measurements, laterality, and negations preserved verbatim, for reviewer trust.
